text:
お帰りなさい！
帰りを心待ちにしていたわ。

鼓の布地は出汁をこしたり
料理を蒸したりするのに使えるし
種火は燃焼材の節約になるわね。

工夫すれば
他にも使い方がありそうね。
ちょっと考えてみるわ。

どうもありがとう！
またお願いしちゃうと思うから
よ
Hey! I'm stoked to see you back so soon.

I can use the cloth from the drums to strain
the broth and steam the food, and the
embers'll help me save on fuel.

I'm sure I can come up with other uses for
them, too. I'll stew on it for a while.

Anyway, you really came through for me, as
always! I'll have more for you to do, so I hope
you'll fork over some more of your time.
